title: The Starry Night
description_narrative: A swirling, dynamic night sky over a quiet village, painted during Van Gogh's stay at the Saint-Paul-de-Mausole asylum in Saint-Rémy-de-Provence. It is one of the most recognized masterpieces in the history of Western art.
tags: night, sky, stars, village, post-impressionism, landscape

title: A Sunday on La Grande Jatte
description_narrative: A monumental example of Pointillism, depicting relaxing Parisians at a park on the banks of the River Seine. Seurat's technique of using distinct dots of color that blend in the viewer's eye fundamentally altered the direction of modern art.
tags: park, people, pointillism, river, leisure, sunday

title: The Great Wave off Kanagawa
medium: Polychrome woodblock print; ink and color on paper
description_narrative: An enormous rogue wave threatening three boats off the coast of the town of Kanagawa, while Mount Fuji rises in the background. It is Hokusai's most famous work and one of the most recognizable works of Japanese art in the world.
tags: wave, ocean, boats, mount fuji, ukiyo-e, landscape

title: Wanderer above the Sea of Fog
description_narrative: A quintessential piece of Romanticism. A man stands upon a rocky precipice with his back to the viewer, gazing out over a landscape covered in a thick sea of fog. It evokes a feeling of the sublime and the profound scale of nature.
tags: fog, mountains, romanticism, sublime, landscape, wanderer

title: Mona Lisa
description_narrative: The most famous painting in the world. It depicts Lisa Gherardini, wife of Francesco del Giocondo, sitting in front of an imaginary landscape. Her enigmatic expression and the masterful use of sfumato make it a masterpiece of the Renaissance.

title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
description_narrative: Often referred to as the 'Mona Lisa of the North', this tronie depicts a European girl wearing an exotic dress, an oriental turban, and what appears to be a very large pearl as an earring. It is a masterclass in the use of light.
tags: portrait, dutch golden age, pearl, turban, female
